optional_asset_role: SOLUSDT and XRPUSDT never affect fitted model coefficients or trees. They may be admitted only when the core-trained model passes the same past validation gates on a universe that includes them.

target.raw: realized conservative net R under the fixed 1.00 ATR15 stop, 1.50R target and four-hour maximum hold
target.ranking_and_report: always use unclipped raw net R

paired_sides: LONG and SHORT rows at the same symbol and decision_time stay in the same chronological split; no random row split is allowed

quarterly_wfo.fit_end: test quarter start minus six months
quarterly_wfo.fit_start: maximum of 2022-01-01 and fit_end minus three years
quarterly_wfo.early_stopping: first three months of the six-month validation window
quarterly_wfo.threshold_universe_selection: last three months of the six-month validation window
quarterly_wfo.label_maturity: each subset uses only labels whose exit_time is before its own end cutoff

score_threshold: quantile of predicted score across all two-sided eligible validation candidates before one-slot replay; thresholds are recomputed from each past validation window
same_decision_selection: choose the largest score; tie-break BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, then LONG before SHORT
feature_scaling: Ridge uses median fill zero after side coding and StandardScaler fit on the fit window only; LightGBM receives float32 with native missing handling
